title: World Cup Player News, Injuries & Updates | RotoWire
original_text: The latest 2026 FIFA World Cup player news covering all 48 nations. Updates include injury reports, lineup confirmations, squad changes, and team news from the group stage through the final in New Jersey.
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
